text: The system shall allow registered users to log in using their email address and password.
The system shall display the account dashboard showing current balance, recent transactions, and quick transfer options after successful login.
The system shall lock the user account after 5 consecutive failed login attempts and send an unlock email to the registered address.
The system shall allow authenticated users to transfer funds between their own accounts by entering an amount and selecting source and destination accounts.
The system shall send an SMS confirmation to the user registered mobile number containing the transfer amount, destination account last 4 digits, and timestamp after every successful fund transfer.
All user authentication sessions shall expire after 15 minutes of inactivity and require re-authentication before any further account access.
Fund transfer transactions shall complete end-to-end processing within 3 seconds for 95% of requests under normal load of up to 10,000 concurrent users.
The system shall encrypt all data transmitted between the client browser and server using TLS 1.3 or higher including login credentials and transaction data.
The system shall maintain persistent login sessions for 30 days on trusted devices to improve user convenience without requiring repeated authentication.
conflict_note: BANK_06 requires 15-minute session expiry. BANK_09 requires 30-day persistence. These cannot both be satisfied simultaneously.

text: The system must be secure and easy to use for all customers.
vague_note: Stage 1 trap: secure undefined, easy to use unmeasurable, all customers unspecified
Stage 1 trap: no time threshold, no load conditions, no measurement criteria

text: The system shall generate a downloadable PDF statement for any selected date range showing all transactions, opening balance, closing balance, and account holder details.
